title: Create: New Armor
description: Add Brass and Rose Quartz armor and Rose Quartz tools
body:
# Create: New Armor

**Create: New Armor** is an addon for the popular [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod that expands the survival experience with new equipment crafted from Create materials.

## Features

- Brass Armor — Mid-tier gear with durability between Iron and Diamond.
- Rose Quartz Armor — Lightweight but sharp. Offers durability between Iron and Diamond, but protection comparable to Diamond.
- Rose Quartz Tools — Crafted like vanilla tools, using Polished Rose Quartz from Create. They strike hard and look great.
- Full integration with Create's item system.
- Custom advancements for both armor sets and tools.

## Compatibility

- Requires **Fabric** 1.20.1  
- Requires **Create** mod  
- Designed to fit naturally into the Create tech tree.

## Concept

The mod is designed to feel like a natural extension of Create — not just visually, but mechanically. Use the resources you already gather with Create to craft powerful new gear that enhances your survival and exploration gameplay.

![New armor on armor stands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0e3c305e725a58e2f98535bdb820116f453b4f8.png)
